creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
The Free Pascal Compiler ports number around 110 and will only increase.  Right now all the ports are maintained under acm@.  I am willing to help him, so I propose that a new team be created, fpc@FreeBSD.org, and transfer ownership of all the ports to that team.

It will initially consist of marino@ and acm@.

What steps need to happen to accomplish this?
